result.summary: Kong exposes Konnect HTTP APIs (control planes, control-plane config, API Catalog, Developer Portal), the Konnect MCP server, and the kongctl CLI; Konnect auth uses PATs or kongctl device-flow tokens.

konnect_pat.label: Konnect personal access token
konnect_pat.setup: Go to [Konnect](https://cloud.konghq.com/), open the personal access token page in your user settings, and choose **Generate Token**. Copy the token once and store it securely. For automation, you can also use `kongctl` with `--pat` or `KONGCTL_DEFAULT_KONNECT_PAT`.

kongctl_device_tokens.label: kongctl device-flow access token pair
kongctl_device_tokens.setup: Run `kongctl login` to start the Konnect device-code flow in your browser. After approval, `kongctl` stores the access and refresh token pair locally under `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/kongctl/` (typically `~/.config/kongctl/`).
